species: A new protein MkC1qDC from the hemolymph plasma of Modiolus kurilensis bivalve mollusk widespread in the Northwest Pacific was purified.
tissue: The MkC1qDC was purified from cell-free hemolymph (plasma) of M. kurilensis.
cell_type: MkC1qDC was found to suppress proliferation of human adenocarcinoma HeLa cells...
